verses.1: Awake, awake! Put on your strength, Zion.
verses.3: For the LORD says, “You were sold for nothing;
verses.5: “Now therefore, what do I do here,” says the LORD,
verses.6: Therefore my people shall know my name.
verses.7: How beautiful on the mountains are the feet of him who brings good news,
verses.8: Your watchmen lift up their voice.
verses.10: The LORD has made his holy arm bare in the eyes of all the nations.
verses.11: Depart! Depart! Go out from there! Touch no unclean thing!
verses.12: For you shall not go out in haste,
verses.13: Behold, my servant will deal wisely.
verses.14: Just as many were astonished at you—
verses.15: so he will cleanse many nations.
